rounds.hint: known for its memory
wears a tuxedo but can't fly
a master of disguise
the smartest swimmer
needs a long scarf in winter
could wear four pairs of gloves
you are what you eat, apparently
no rush, ever
the ultimate copycat
has its own theme music
sleeps most of the day in trees
gives painful hugs
loves to show off its outfit
sees with its ears
carries its kids in a pocket
the fastest on land
the night shift worker of the sky
no brain, no bones, still stings
nature couldn't decide what to make
howls at the moon with its squad
